name: Cantaloupe Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Make cantaloupe liquid in a blender from approximately 1 1/2 cups of seeded and peeled ripe cantaloupe chunks. Heat the mixture.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients in the order listed.
3. Set the oven temperature to 10 o'clock (white bread setting).
4. Mix until a soft, sticky dough forms. If any dough sticks to the sides of the pan at the end of the first kneading, use a rubber spatula to push it down.
5. The resulting bread is soft and delicious, reminiscent of an unusual Texas treat featuring peeled cantaloupe segments arranged in a sunburst pattern on a serving plate, with bread cubes piled in the center and covered with cream sauce, paprika dusting, and red jelly dots. Enjoy by spreading your own jelly on slices or layering with whipped cream and diced cantaloupe for a variety of flavors.
